commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the king of Assyria brought men from Babylon, and from Cuthah, and from Avva, and from Hamath, and from Sepharvaim, and placed them in the cities of Samaria instead of the children of Israel: and they possessed Samaria, and dwelt in its cities. King, Assaraddon, who led away the remnants of Israel, and fulfilled the prediction, Isaias vii. (Du Hamel) Babylon, or the territory. These people had been lately conquered from the Babylonian empire, from Syria Cutha: the greatest part were from this city; so that the Samaritans were afterwards called Cutheans. Emath, on the Orontes. Sepharvaim; or the Saspires, near Media. (Calmet) We find several other places mentioned, 1 Esdras iv.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
